calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-17-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing and was continued from 04-12-11.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff: Citibank (South Dakota), N.A.
No appearance by Defendant Ben A. Garcia.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $2,739.70
Costs - $264.00
Total - $3,003.70
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Continued To May-17-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Citibank. N.A.

No appearance by Defendant Ben A. Garcia.

Matter was continued to May 17, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 for counsel to obtain a copy of the filed declaration (CCP 98), and to submit to the court before the hearing date for review.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Assigned To Trial Court
